---
title: "Rodrigo Aguayo"
---

<!--
  The home page uses customer header/footer includes from _quarto.yml.
-->

<div class="page">

# Rodrigo Aguayo

**Climate Scientist & Hydrologist**

Postdoctoral researcher at the [Vrije Universiteit Brussel](https://hydr.vub.be/people/rodrigo.aguayo), part of the [bglacier](https://hydr.vub.be/research-groups/bglacier) group. My research lies at the intersection of large-scale hydrology, glaciology, climate change, and deep learning for Earth systems.

<div class="social-links">
  <a class="social-link" href="mailto:rodrigo.aguayo@vub.be">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
    Email
  </a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://bsky.app/profile/rodaguayo.bsky.social">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-1 17.93c-3.95-.49-7-3.85-7-7.93 0-.62.08-1.21.21-1.79L9 15v1c0 1.1.9 2 2 2v1.93zm6.9-2.54c-.26-.81-1-1.39-1.9-1.39h-1v-3c0-.55-.45-1-1-1H8v-2h2c.55 0 1-.45 1-1V7h2c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2v-.41c2.93 1.19 5 4.06 5 7.41 0 2.08-.8 3.97-2.1 5.39z"/></svg>
    Bluesky
  </a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://github.com/rodaguayo">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12c0 4.42 2.87 8.17 6.84 9.5.5.08.66-.23.66-.5v-1.69c-2.77.6-3.36-1.34-3.36-1.34-.46-1.16-1.11-1.47-1.11-1.47-.91-.62.07-.6.07-.6 1 .07 1.53 1.03 1.53 1.03.87 1.52 2.34 1.07 2.91.83.09-.65.35-1.09.63-1.34-2.22-.25-4.55-1.11-4.55-4.92 0-1.11.38-2 1.03-2.71-.1-.25-.45-1.29.1-2.64 0 0 .84-.27 2.75 1.02.79-.22 1.65-.33 2.5-.33.85 0 1.71.11 2.5.33 1.91-1.29 2.75-1.02 2.75-1.02.55 1.35.2 2.39.1 2.64.65.71 1.03 1.6 1.03 2.71 0 3.82-2.34 4.66-4.57 4.91.36.31.69.92.69 1.85V21c0 .27.16.59.67.5C19.14 20.16 22 16.42 22 12A10 10 0 0012 2z"/></svg>
    GitHub
  </a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=P_LBnTbIAy8C&hl=en">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2L2 7v1l10 5 10-5V7l-10-5zM2 10v5l10 5 10-5v-5L12 15 2 10z"/></svg>
    Google Scholar
  </a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2335-8470">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zM7.5 7.5h2v9h-2v-9zm4.5 0h2c1.5 0 2.5.5 3 1.5s.5 2 .5 3.5c0 1.5-.5 2.5-1.5 3.5s-2 1.5-3.5 1.5h-2v-9zm2 7.5c.5 0 .83-.17 1-.5s.33-.83.33-1.5c0-.67-.11-1.17-.33-1.5s-.5-.5-1-.5h-.5v4h.5z"/></svg>
    ORCID
  </a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Rodrigo-Aguayo">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-1 15h-2v-6h2v6zm-1-7c-.55 0-1-.45-1-1s.45-1 1-1 1 .45 1 1-.45 1-1 1zm5 7h-2v-4c0-.55-.45-1-1-1s-1 .45-1 1v4h-2v-6h2v1c.42-.59 1.11-1 2-1 1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v4z"/></svg>
    ResearchGate
  </a>
</div>

---

## Research Themes

<div class="card">
  <h3>🧊 Glaciology & Glacier Hydrology</h3>
  <p>Global and regional glacier evolution, glacier runoff projections, ice dynamics, glacier lake-terminating systems, multi-century glacier evolution.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>💧 Large-Scale Hydrology & Climate Impacts</h3>
  <p>Climate change impacts on water resources, hydrological droughts, freshwater inputs to coastal systems, hybrid glacio-hydrological modelling.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>🤖 Deep Learning for Earth Systems</h3>
  <p>Deep learning applications for glacier buffering of streamflow droughts, AI/ML for hydrological prediction, open-source reproducible workflows.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>🌍 Open Science & Data</h3>
  <p>Open hydrometeorological datasets (PatagoniaMet), reproducible research, open-source tools for glacier modelling.</p>
</div>

---

## Featured Publications

- **Aguayo R.**, Zekollari H., Hanus, S., Baez-Villanueva, O., Mendoza, P,. and Maussion F (2025). [Hybrid glacio-hydrological modelling reveals contrasting runoff changes in Western Patagonia over the 21st century](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2025EF006442). *Earth's Future*

- **Aguayo, R.**, Maussion F., Ultee, L., Mackay, J., Caro, A., Schuster, L., Fernandez, A., Schaefer, M., León-Muñoz, J. and Aguayo, M., (2024) [Unravelling the sources of uncertainty in glacier runoff projections in the Patagonian Andes (40–56° S)](https://tc.copernicus.org/articles/18/5383/2024/). *The Cryosphere*

- **Aguayo, R.**, León-Muñoz, J., Aguayo, M., Baez-Villanueva, O., Fernandez, A. Zambrano-Bigiarini, M., and Jacques-Coper, M. (2024) [PatagoniaMet: A multi-source hydrometeorological dataset for Western Patagonia (40-56ºS)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-023-02828-2). *Scientific Data*

- **Aguayo, R.,** León-Muñoz, J., Garreaud, R. and Montecinos, A (2021). [Hydrological droughts in the southern Andes (40-45ºS) from an ensemble experiment using CMIP5 and CMIP6 models](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-021-84807-4). *Scientific Reports*

[View all publications →](publications.qmd)

---

## News

**May 2026** — Glacier runoff projections paper featured in *Earth's Future*.

**Apr 2026** — Participated as a speaker at the EGU General Assembly 2026.

**Mar 2026** — New dataset on lake-terminating glaciers published in *Earth System Science Data*.

**Feb 2026** — Glacier extinction peak paper published in *Nature Climate Change* (covered by 250+ media outlets).

**Jan 2026** — Joined as reviewer for *The Cryosphere*.

</div>
